project.title: Nardexis Day 1 - India's Crypto Tax Crackdown
project.notes: 12 scenes, Ken Burns only (no Wan 2.2). Brand palette: near-black/navy background, single accent color (electric blue/teal/amber), abstract geometric N motif, no coin/dollar-sign cliche imagery. Disclaimer and source-citation overlays to be added via overlay_generator.py in a later step - not yet wired into this JSON.
project.final_movie: projects\Nardexis Day 1 - India Crypto Tax\07_Final_Movie\Nardexis Day 1 - India Crypto Tax_Complete.mp4

scenes.voice_over: India just tightened the screws on crypto again. And if you're holding coins, trading on Indian exchanges, or even thinking about it, this changes your math. Let's break down exactly what's happening and what it means for your money.
scenes.image_prompt: Abstract dark navy near-black background, single electric blue geometric line pattern suggesting a rising tax graph, minimalist financial data motif, no text, no coins, no dollar signs, premium moody lighting, clean modern design.

scenes.voice_over: Here's the current framework in plain language. Crypto gains in India are taxed at a flat rate, with no deduction allowed for losses against other income, and every transfer between wallets or exchanges can count as a taxable event.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, minimalist electric blue flowchart made of thin geometric lines and nodes, abstract representation of a tax calculation process, no readable text, clean premium financial infographic style.

scenes.voice_over: That framework hasn't loosened. If anything, enforcement has gotten sharper, with exchanges required to report user activity directly to tax authorities.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract electric blue network of connected nodes representing data reporting between exchanges and an authority, minimalist geometric style, no text, no logos.

scenes.voice_over: So who's actually affected? Retail traders making frequent small trades feel this hardest, since every single trade is a taxable event regardless of profit size.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract amber geometric figure representing a single small trader among many tiny connected dots, minimalist financial illustration, premium moody lighting, no text.

scenes.voice_over: Long-term holders are somewhat insulated, since they're not triggering repeated taxable events. Exchanges, meanwhile, absorb the compliance burden and pass reporting costs down to users.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract electric blue geometric shape resembling a locked vault or held asset, minimalist and clean, single accent color, no text.

scenes.voice_over: This isn't India's first swing at crypto taxation. Compared to the rules introduced a few years ago, this latest tightening closes reporting loopholes rather than raising the headline tax rate itself.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract minimalist timeline made of electric blue geometric markers along a line, financial history motif, no text, no dates, clean premium style.

scenes.voice_over: Compared globally, India's approach is stricter than most. Many countries allow loss offsets or hold-based exemptions. India currently offers neither.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract world map rendered as minimalist electric blue geometric dot grid, no borders or labels, premium financial data visualization style.

scenes.voice_over: The likely behavioral response is predictable. Some capital quietly moves offshore to exchanges outside Indian jurisdiction, where reporting requirements don't reach.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract electric blue arrow-like geometric shape moving outward from a central cluster toward the edge of frame, minimalist motion illustration, no text.

scenes.voice_over: On the domestic side, expect volume on registered exchanges to soften, while peer-to-peer, grey-market activity picks up the slack. That's a worse outcome for regulators, not a better one.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract two geometric shapes exchanging in a shadowed, less-lit corner of frame, minimalist and moody, single amber accent, no text.

scenes.voice_over: So what should you actually take from this? This is general education, not financial advice. But if you're active in crypto, get familiar with how each transaction is classified before you trade, not after.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract minimalist electric blue checklist icon made from simple geometric lines, clean premium financial illustration, no readable text.

scenes.voice_over: Keep detailed records of every transaction, timestamps, amounts, and wallet addresses included, and talk to a qualified tax professional before assuming how a specific trade will be treated.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract electric blue geometric folder or ledger icon rendered minimally, single accent color, clean premium design, no text.

scenes.voice_over: This is a developing story, and rules like this tend to shift fast. I'll keep tracking it. If you want the next update the moment it drops, subscribe. What do you think, overreach or overdue? Drop it in the comments.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark navy background, abstract geometric N motif built from angular interlocking electric blue lines, subtle network feel, premium brand mark style, centered, no other text.
